arts.ttl: Barcelona make SHOCK hijack of Bayern Munich transfer with deal 'practically done'
arts.sum: Tah is out of contract at the end of the season and had been strongly linked with a move to Bayern in the summer but the 28-year-old now looks set for Barca after club director Deco met with the player’s representatives in Germany. Barcelona could have already secured their first signing of 2025 in a move that would hijack a long-term transfer planned by Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich prodigy Paul Wanner draws interest from Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Paul Wanner, only 18 years of age, is currently on loan assignment at FC Heidenheim — whom the Bavarians play this weekend. Frankfurt is currently coached by former Bayern assistant Dino Toppmöller, who was Germany men’s national team coach Julian Nagelsmann’s right hand during his time in Bavaria.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich’s FIFA Club World Cup group stage opponents have been confirmed
arts.sum: Bayern will play Auckland City first, then Boca Juniors followed by the final group match against S.L. Benfica. Group C: Bayern Munich, Benfica, Boca Juniors, Auckland City

arts.ttl: That was quick: Suddenly, Bayern Munich reportedly leads the race for Hoffenheim wunderkind Tom Bischof
arts.sum: On Tuesday, Florian Plettenberg was first to report a possible transfer of TSG Hoffenheim player Tim Bischof to Bayern Munich . But, just two days later, a different source not only corroborates Bayern’s interest in the 19-year-old but even claims that the Bavarian giants are leading the race, as captured by @iMiaSanMia :

arts.ttl: FIFA Club World Cup 25 draw LIVE: Countdown to the start of the draw
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the draw for the FIFA Club World Cup for 2025. The game will feature Lionel Messi's Inter Miami, but who they face will be decided on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Transfer Update: Bayern Munich confident they can sign Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz this summer
arts.sum: Carro has publicly spoken out against Bayern board member for sport Max Eberl, which Tah’s agent claimed severely complicated matters with negotiations over a potential deal for the center back during the summer transfer window. Alongside the contract extension negotiations for Jamal Musiala, the club is ready to pull out all of the financial stops to sign the German playmaker from Die Werkself, going against the grain of their usual financially conservative practices in the transfer market.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich closing in on Alphonso Davies contract extension
arts.sum: Davies is out of contract next June, and clubs from Real Madrid to Manchester United were rumored to have turned his head. In a turn of tables, Bayern Munich could now be on the verge of sealing a contract extension for left-back and Canadian men’s national team star Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies edges closer to signing Bayern Munich contract extension
arts.sum: As reported by Sky Germany, Alphonso Davies is edging closer to signing a new contract extension with Bayern Munich. For a long time, it had looked like the 24-year-old Canadian…
